events.label: assistant
events.text: Diagnosis written to `/app/answer.json`: a twisted brake hose is treated as a **fail** (high risk) — the twist concentrates flex stress at one point, accelerates hose fatigue/cracking, and can restrict fluid flow causing uneven braking, which is non-compliant with FMVSS 106-adjacent installation practice. Recommended corrective action is reroute/replace the hose, bleed, leak-check, and road test before return to service.
